qualitative_assessment: MP Jagadish Chandra Barma Basunia shows a mixed transparency profile with significant areas of concern. While he maintains a clean criminal record (100/100), his performance is notably poor in committee participation (0/100), legislative engagement (0/100), and public accessibility (10/100). The moderate scores in MPLADS utilization and assets disclosure are offset by weak parliamentary participation and engagement metrics.
key_finding: Clean record but poor committee and legislative engagement
